text: Science has a clearer story about levels of processing than social media does. Levels of processing explains how deeply we engage with information. Shallow processing? Just skimming the surface. Deep processing? That's where true understanding lies. Studies show that deeper connections enhance memory retention, while shallow encounters fade quickly. So next time, ask yourself: Are you really understanding, or just scrolling? Dive deeper into your learning—like and follow for more science insights.
